ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., Relay, LED, Sensor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL for component visualization */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the component is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Relay, LED) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the specification belongs to */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., Voltage, Current Rating) */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the specification (e.g., V, A) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the system (e.g., engineer, sales) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component available */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, shelf) */,
  "min_reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity to trigger a reorder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lifecycle" (
  "lifecycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifecycle change */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component undergoing lifecycle change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date when the status was last changed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lifecycle was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lifecycle was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifecycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lifecycle_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component being ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component associated with the document */,
  "doc_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_version" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component associated with the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_version_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
